characters.name: Adam Savage
characters.description: Adam Whitney Savageis one of the main hosts onMythBusters, along withJamie Hyneman, who hired Adam as a co-host because he felt it would make the program more entertaining. Adam is more likely to be excited than Jamie. He pokes fun at Jamie a lot. He collects various unusual curios. There are very few moments when Adam is speechless. Adam is directly responsible for addingBustertoMythbustersafter purchasing a crash test dummy to stand in forJamieduring theExploding Toilet Myth. He is eccentric and likes to have much fun while busting, proving the plausibility of myths, or confirming them. Furthermore, for the fans, he is like the uncle of the mythbusters family. Adam's personality fits his last name, "Savage." He is the source of most of the show's comedy, which is impulsive, easy to excite, and surprisingly clumsy. Tory claims Adam used to work as if a camera crew was always following him, so he is in his element hosting the show. Like Tory, Adam tends to hurt himself on camera, though Jamie sometimes lends a helping hand. He mentions his receding hairline in the earlier episodes but only grows it throughout the series. The times and ways he got hurt include, but are not limited to: Adam's personality fits his last name, "Savage." characters.name: Buster
characters.description: Busteris a crash test dummy that plays an important role in many experiments by taking the place of a human subject in the more dangerous myth tests. The first and most recognized of the dummies used in the show, Buster was introduced in the beginning of the first season for theExploding Toilet Myth. Adam had procured the dummy to take the place of Jamie (who had second thoughts about testing the myth because he realized the foam he would be using was flammable), and Jamie gave it its name. Because of the nature of the situations in which the MythBusters use him, Buster has been subjected to forces and situations that far exceed his original design parameters as an automobile crash test dummy. As a testament to the danger of the tests in which he is used—often resulting in his being broken into pieces, burnt, or otherwise mutilated—Buster has had to be extensively repaired and rebuilt over the course of the series to the point that an entire special was devoted to his being completely redesigned and rebuilt as "Buster 2.0". Buster was designed with quick and simple repair in mind, and boasts improved joints, with a more realistic range of movement, and easily replaceable poplar wood "bones". Poplar was chosen because its shear strength was very similar to human bone, providing an accurate gauge of how bones would react in experiments. Buster's new flesh (with the exception of his face, hands, and feet) is made of a silicone marketed for use in animatronics called Dragon Skin. Buster's original head was retained when he was rebuilt, but it had to be replaced after it was shattered during a mishap on theEscape Slide Parachute Myth. His original face was retained to fit over his replacement head. They tested Buster 2.0 by dropping him 60 feet (about 20 meters) off a crane while inside a donated Cadillac named Earl. Buster 2.0(?)[1]

characters.name: Erik Gates
characters.description: Erik Gateswas a recurring guest on the show Mythbusters. He died in 2009. Erik is a rocketry expert. He has appeared in several episodes, providing his rockets and rocketry expertise. Erik is a rocketry expert. He has appeared in several episodes, providing his rockets and rocketry expertise.
characters.personality_section: Erik is a rocketry expert. He has appeared in several episodes, providing his rockets and rocketry expertise.

characters.name: Grant Imahara
characters.description: Grant Imaharawas a cohost of the show Mythbusters. He was a part of the Build Team along withToriandKari. Grant first appeared in Season 2 Episode 20. On the “Hollywood on Trial" special (Season 3, Episode Special-6), which aired on 5/11/2005, he subsequently replacedScottie Chapmanas Tori and Kari's new team member. He is often shown while doing complex calculations, often regarding speeds of objects. He is keen at building and incorporating robots into the builds. He is often shown while doing complex calculations, often regarding speeds of objects. He is keen at building and incorporating robots into the builds. InAirplane on Conveyor Beltit is revealed that Grant is proficient at flying remote controlled airoplanes, which led to him instructingAdamandJamie.

characters.name: Jamie Hyneman
characters.description: James Franklin "Jamie" Hynemanis one of the main hosts onMythBusters, along withAdam Savage. He is also the owner ofM5 Industries, a special effects workshop where MythBusters is filmed. Jamie tends to be very monotone and nonchalant but has been seen to have a sense of humor and extensive love/hate relationship with Adam. Jamie has a large mustache, beard, black beret, and glasses. He usually wears a white button-up shirt and is completely bald. Adam called him "Walrus" a few because his mustache makes him vaguely resemble one. Jamie tends to be very monotone and nonchalant but has been seen to have a sense of humor and extensive love/hate relationship with Adam.
characters.personality_section: Jamie tends to be very monotone and nonchalant but has been seen to have a sense of humor and extensive love/hate relationship with Adam.

characters.name: Jon Lung
characters.description: Jon Lung with his partner Brian Louden on the show Mythbusters Jon Juhan Lung is an Amarican star and as known as the co-host of MythBusters with his partner Brian Louden Jon Lung is originally fromBrooklyn,New York. He moved toHeartland Village, Staten Islandas a child. He graduated from Susan Wagner High School then attended college atLehigh UniversityinBethlehem, Pennsylvania.[1]Lung attended theSchool of Visual Arts(SVA) in Manhattan, where he received hisMFAinProducts of Designin 2016. His MFA thesis project was aimed at encouraging people to be inventive and resourceful with everyday objects, and was inspired by the TV seriesMacGyver.

characters.name: Kari Byron
characters.description: Kari Elizabeth Byronis the only female co-host (afterScottie Chapmanleft). She became part of theBuild Teamand was the only host to take leave off the show for more than one episode due to her pregnancy. Her first appearance on the show was back in the show's pilot mini-season in the episodeJet-Assisted Chevy. Kari was originally an intern forJamieworking atM5 Industries. During theJet-Assisted Chevy (episode)she tailed the caravan to help with setting up the myth in theMojave Desert. She's seen in the background in other Season 1 episodes and eventually started coming to the forefront in theVacuum Toilet Mythas a body model for the butt they would eventually use to test the myth. Kari was the body model for theVacuum Toilet myth.

characters.name: Robert Lee
characters.description: Robert Leeis the narrator forMythbusters. Robert Lee(bornSeptember 25, 1957) is the narrator of the series, who shares the job of explaining experiments and facts with the hosts, often using a copious number ofpunsand humor. While he did not curse in the earlier episodes, he uses mildprofanityin the more recent ones. In some regions—such as theUKandScandinavia—he is replaced by Irish and British narratorsRobin BanksorDaisy Beaumont.Rufus Houndnarrates the version of the show that aired on theBBC.Robert has been the narrator for more than 10 years. With the airing of Mythbusters: The Search, Robert becomes the longest-serving member of the cast.

characters.name: Sgt. J.D. Nelson
characters.description: Sgt. J.D. Nelsonis a recurring guest on the show Mythbusters. He assists the Mythbusters as the Alameda County Sheriff Sergeant/EOD Team leader. As his title implies, he is an police sergeant for the Alameda County Sheriff's Dept. He often assists the Mythbusters with higher-power explosives and firearms safety.

characters.name: Tory Belleci
characters.description: Tory Belleciwas one of the secondary cohosts of the show Mythbusters, beginning in Season Two. He was a part of the Build Team along withGrantandKari. Like Kari, Tory has been a part of the Mythbusters show almost since the beginning making brief appearances. He later became part of the Build Team. Tory is the most daring of the Build Team. He occasionally is the one who is chosen to do the dangerous experiments and also takes unnecessary risks. Tory is the most daring of the Build Team. He occasionally is the one who is chosen to do the dangerous experiments and also takes unnecessary risks.
